creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
This really is a very old version of the arm Embedded Toolchain.

The current site at
https://developer.arm.com/downloads/-/arm-gnu-toolchain-downloads
(and, yes, I updated the port with the new address) is at 14.2 
whereas this port is at 10.3.20210921 - four years behind.

Note that GCC 10 has been end of life for nearly two years.


Lev, any chance you can update the port?

(I predict that'll also make this issue go away.)
